creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Testcase: Add
> LICENSE_FILE_XYZ=       ${SRCDIR}/LICENSE
to any port's LICENSExx section and observe how 'portlint -C' doesn't complain.

It should only allow licenses that were declared in the 'LICENSE' line. If the LICENSE value contains '+' (ex. GPLv3+), portlint should require one space after the plus sign:
> LICENSE_FILE_GPLv3+ =   ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE


Yuri
